_meta.note: Synthetic URLScan.io-style results for CelltronX lookalike domains. All IPs are documentation ranges.

scans.title: CelltronX NOC — Secure Access Portal
scans.page_text_excerpt: Please enter your CelltronX employee credentials to access the Network Operations Center portal. For security purposes, MFA authentication is required.
scans.screenshot_description: Blue login page with CelltronX logo (slightly pixelated, appears hotlinked from official site). Username and password fields. 'Login with Okta' button pointing to attacker-controlled Okta relay.
scans.assessment: AiTM phishing page. Collects username, password, and OTP token simultaneously — consistent with session cookie theft via adversary-in-the-middle proxy (Evilginx/Modlishka pattern). The OTP field means the adversary relays credentials in real-time to capture the session token AFTER MFA.

scans.title: CelltronX IT Self-Service Helpdesk
scans.page_text_excerpt: Submit IT tickets, reset your password, or check service status. Please log in with your employee credentials.
scans.screenshot_description: Generic helpdesk portal. CelltronX branding applied but fonts differ from official site. Login form present.
scans.assessment: Credential harvesting page. No OTP field — may target accounts without MFA, or this is a first-stage collector that re-presents credentials to trigger real MFA. Same hosting infrastructure as domain 1.

scans.title: Parked Domain
scans.page_text_excerpt: This domain is parked. Please check back later.
scans.assessment: Parked. No active content at scan time. Same /24 as the two active domains — likely pre-positioned for future use. Monitor for content changes.

infrastructure_summary.registration_pattern: All registered within 9-day window (Oct 1–9); all privacy-protected
infrastructure_summary.threat_cluster_overlap: Infrastructure pattern matches CEDAR-SIGNAL profile (TRG-004): Vultr hosting, Let's Encrypt TLS, Porkbun/Namecheap, lookalike domains registered days before first use
